subject: [SDNC] Provide hardcoded aaiclient.properties file via helm
commit_message:
[SDNC] Provide hardcoded aaiclient.properties file via helm

Currently /opt/onap/ccsdk/data/properties directory with its
configfiles is saved in sdnc image and not provided via helm.
File "aaiclient.properties" stored there appears to be used for
determining AAI URI by directed graphs. In this patch,
aaiclient.properties provided by configmap is added to this directory,
with still being passed to previous one. This helps with following
error you could see in karaf logs:
2020-04-06T11:18:12,714 | WARN  | qtp1411815619-117 | AAIService | 218 - org.onap.ccsdk.sli.adaptors.aai-service-provider - 0.7.1 |  - 33 (update) | java.net.UnknownHostException: aai.api.simpledemo.onap.org

Issue-ID: SDNC-1130
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I8ed73f49092912419794abac1f8ccd6325672eb5

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 5 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This change is ready for review.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4387/

Patch Set 1:

Original file and the one that substitutes it now differ just in AAI URI and credentials (in my opinion, both on favor of helm-provided file). You can check exact differences by comparing following files:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=sdnc/oam.git;a=blob_plain;f=installation/src/main/properties/aaiclient.properties;hb=refs/heads/master (original)
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=oom.git;a=blob_plain;f=kubernetes/sdnc/resources/config/conf/aaiclient.properties;h=5d4473c978ae1e1932060869c25c863804d9695a;hb=HEAD (used with this patch applied)

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I agree with the change, let's wait for Dan +1 and gating results

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4387/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/4387
